/usr/bin/g++ -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatservice.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/main.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/db.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/friendmodel.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/groupmodel.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/offlinemessagemodel.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/usermodel.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/redis/redis.o -o ../../../bin/ChatServer  -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lhiredis -lpthread
